title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core covering read, write, edit, and bash operations. Extensions can be installed from npm and git or written from scratch. Pi supports multiple model backends including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, offering a cost-effective alternative to frontier models.
